body:
In Pleasanton, California, the average price for a full garage door replacement generally ranges from **$1,200 to $3,500** for standard installations. Because local labor rates in the Bay Area skew higher than the national average, your final price will largely depend on the size of your garage and the materials you choose. [New Garage Door Cost: 2026 Price & Feature Guide - Alan's Factory Outlet](https://alansfactoryoutlet.com/blog/garage-door-cost/#:~:text=The%20cost%20of%20a%20new%20garage%20door,garage%20door%20is%20cheaper%20than%20repairing%20it.)

Here is a breakdown of what you can expect to pay:

### Cost by Garage Size (Includes Parts & Labor)

  * **Single-Car Garage Door (8x7 or 9x7):** **$800 – $1,500** for standard steel; mid-to-high-end materials can range from **$1,000 – $2,800**.

  * **Double-Car Garage Door (16x7):** **$1,200 – $2,800** for basic models; insulated or stylized options typically cost **$1,800 – $4,500**.

### Cost Breakdown by Materials

The material you select has the biggest impact on the total price:

Material| Estimated Price Range (Installed)  
---|---  
**Standard Steel**|  $1,200 – $3,000  
**Faux Wood / Composite**|  $2,200 – $5,000  
**Solid Wood (Custom/Carriage)**|  $3,000 – $7,000+  
**Full-View Glass & Aluminum**| $4,000 – $9,000  
  
### Additional Potential Costs

When budgeting for a full replacement, keep these potential add-ons in mind:

  * **Garage Door Opener:** If you are replacing an old opener at the same time, expect an additional **$250 to $500** for the unit and installation. [The 10 Best Garage Door Installers in Pleasanton, CA (2026) - HomeGuide](https://homeguide.com/ca/pleasanton/garage-door-installation/#:~:text=Installation%20includes%3A%20old%20door%20removal%2C%20installing%20the,%24350%20on%20average%2C%20depending%20on%20the%20service.)

  * **Insulation:** Choosing an insulated door (highly recommended in California to regulate garage temperature and reduce energy bills) will typically add **15% to 40%** to the base material cost. [How Much Does Garage Door Replacement Cost in San Francisco, CA? | Angi](https://www.angi.com/articles/garage-door-replacement-cost/ca/san-francisco#:~:text=Glass%2Ffull%2Dview%20\(with%20aluminum%2Fsteel%20frame\)%20%7C%20%244%2C000%E2%80%93%249%2C000%20%7C,if%20the%20garage%20isn't%20a%20conditioned%20space)

  * **Removal and Disposal:** Most local Pleasanton installers include the removal and haul-away of your old door in their standard labor fee, but some may charge a separate **$50 to $200** disposal fee.

> **Tip:** It is always a good idea to get at least 2 to 3 written estimates from local installers serving the Tri-Valley area. Ensure their quotes explicitly state whether they include new tracks, springs, and old-door disposal.
